voice_observations.voiceover_text: Hey, I'm Jay and I'm the founder of Our Write Your Letters Clothing, based here in Dubai. So when I was thinking of names for the brand, I had a few ideas in mind, but there was a couple of things that the name had to do. Ultimately, it was about respect, respect for each other. When you wear Our Write Your Letters, you know that you respect each other, right? It's about being real, it's about being human. The other thing really was to do with my own kind of personal values as a designer. I've always had this love of Japanese street culture. You know, something that would kind of be a coming together of those two types of values I was looking for. Japanese idiom, Togami Kakuyo, something you say to each other in Asia, specifically in Japan. Saying goodbye to a friend. It basically means, you know, it was great to see you, I'll see you again. When you translate it directly to English, Togami Kakuyo becomes, I miss you, I'll write your letters. I think, you know, even though we are a very contemporary wear brand and even though we are based in Dubai and we're founded here and we'll always be a Dubai brand, I love the fact that when I see someone in the mall, you know, wearing one of our tees or wearing one of our hoodies, I feel those two values, innit? I feel that admiration and respect and I feel that nod to Japanese street culture and yeah, it's wicked.
